'''鈭歜-j-p''' ('''kabajap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cabbage|cabbage]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-j-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cabbage|cabbage]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-j-p
|-
! Lemma
| kabajap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibajap|thibajap]] || [[word:jibajap|jibajap]] || [[word:shibajap|shibajap]] || [[word:kibajap|kibajap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubajap|thuthubajap]] || [[word:jujubajap|jujubajap]] || [[word:shushubajap|shushubajap]] || [[word:kukubajap|kukubajap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubajap|thubajap]] || [[word:jubajap|jubajap]] || [[word:shubajap|shubajap]] || [[word:kubajap|kubajap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubajap|thubajap]] || [[word:jubajap|jubajap]] || [[word:shubajap|shubajap]] || [[word:kubajap|kubajap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebajap|thebajap]] || [[word:jebajap|jebajap]] || [[word:shebajap|shebajap]] || [[word:kebajap|kebajap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobajap|thothobajap]] || [[word:jojobajap|jojobajap]] || [[word:shoshobajap|shoshobajap]] || [[word:kokobajap|kokobajap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobajap|thobajap]] || [[word:jobajap|jobajap]] || [[word:shobajap|shobajap]] || [[word:kobajap|kobajap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobajap|thobajap]] || [[word:jobajap|jobajap]] || [[word:shobajap|shobajap]] || [[word:kobajap|kobajap]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:bajap|bajap]] || [[word:bajap|bajap]] || [[word:bajap|bajap]] || [[word:bajap|bajap]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:bajap|bajap]] || [[word:bajap|bajap]] || [[word:bajap|bajap]] || [[word:bajap|bajap]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:bajap|bajap]] || [[word:bajap|bajap]] || [[word:bajap|bajap]] || [[word:bajap|bajap]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:bajap|bajap]] || [[word:bajap|bajap]] || [[word:bajap|bajap]] || [[word:bajap|bajap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙bajap|th忙bajap]] || [[word:j忙bajap|j忙bajap]] || [[word:sh忙bajap|sh忙bajap]] || [[word:k忙bajap|k忙bajap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabajap|thathabajap]] || [[word:jajabajap|jajabajap]] || [[word:shashabajap|shashabajap]] || [[word:kakabajap|kakabajap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabajap|thabajap]] || [[word:jabajap|jabajap]] || [[word:shabajap|shabajap]] || [[word:kabajap|kabajap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabajap|thabajap]] || [[word:jabajap|jabajap]] || [[word:shabajap|shabajap]] || [[word:kabajap|kabajap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shabajap|shabajap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshabajap|goshabajap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishabajap|gokishabajap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shabajapn眉|shabajapn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshabajapnkn眉|goshabajapnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishabajapn眉|gokishabajapn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabajapsh毛|shabajapsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabajapnksh毛|goshabajapnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabajapsh毛|gokishabajapsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabajapro|shabajapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabajapnkro|goshabajapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabajapro|gokishabajapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shabajapmu|shabajapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabajapnkmu|goshabajapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabajapmu|gokishabajapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shabajapsher|shabajapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshabajapnksher|goshabajapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishabajapsher|gokishabajapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shabajapng|shabajapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshabajapnkng|goshabajapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishabajapng|gokishabajapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shabajapya|shabajapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshabajapnkya|goshabajapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishabajapya|gokishabajapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shabajapyam|shabajapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshabajapnkyam|goshabajapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishabajapyam|gokishabajapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabajapn眉sh毛|shabajapn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabajapnkn眉sh毛|goshabajapnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabajapn眉sh毛|gokishabajapn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabajapn眉ro|shabajapn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabajapnkn眉ro|goshabajapnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabajapn眉ro|gokishabajapn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabajapn眉mu|shabajapn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabajapnkn眉mu|goshabajapnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabajapn眉mu|gokishabajapn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabajapsh毛n眉|shabajapsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabajapnksh毛n眉|goshabajapnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabajapsh毛n眉|gokishabajapsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabajapsh毛ro|shabajapsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabajapnksh毛ro|goshabajapnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabajapsh毛ro|gokishabajapsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabajapsh毛mu|shabajapsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabajapnksh毛mu|goshabajapnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabajapsh毛mu|gokishabajapsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabajapron眉|shabajapron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabajapnkron眉|goshabajapnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabajapron眉|gokishabajapron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabajaprosh毛|shabajaprosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabajapnkrosh毛|goshabajapnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabajaprosh毛|gokishabajaprosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabajapromu|shabajapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabajapnkromu|goshabajapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabajapromu|gokishabajapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabajapmun眉|shabajapmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabajapnkmun眉|goshabajapnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabajapmun眉|gokishabajapmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabajapmush毛|shabajapmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabajapnkmush毛|goshabajapnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabajapmush毛|gokishabajapmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabajapmuro|shabajapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabajapnkmuro|goshabajapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabajapmuro|gokishabajapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
